title: Rigo
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image=[[File:Rigo.jpg]] |name=Rigo |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' [[Riflor/Legends|Riflor]]{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=Red |skin=Brown |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|More creds if alive. Safer if dead. Which way we go?''"
"''Safer.|Unnamed bounty and Rigo|[[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]]}} '''Rigo''' was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who lived at the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the conflict between the Republic and the Separatists, he and a gang of bounty hunters attacked [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha-17]], which had previously landed on Riflor. Rigo and his gang lured the two into a dead end and convert them. Shortly after [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] arrived to [[Rescue at Riflor|rescue]] Obi-Wan, in which they managed to overwhelm the gang and Rigo was killed in the fight. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rigo |pl=Rigo }} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]]
